summary: Dashboard displays correct empty state with proper mobile layout, but visual styling deviates from the diner brand palette requirements for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard uses generic neutral gray/white palette instead of maintaining brand palette consistency with public surfaces. Background appears white/neutral rather than using the defined diner palette colors.

actions: Apply diner brand palette to authenticated dashboard surface to maintain visual continuity with public routes
Consider using cream surface (#fff8ea) for cards and appropriate accent colors from the defined palette
Verify mobile drawer navigation remains functional at 390px viewport
